description: Express app using lodash _.merge() and _.get() but never calling the vulnerable _.template() function. CVE-2021-23337 should be not_affected.

provenance.ground_truth_notes: lodash is imported and _.merge() and _.get() are called, but _.template() is never invoked. The code path never reaches the vulnerable function.

findings.human_justification: The vulnerable function _.template() is never called. Only _.merge() for config merging and _.get() for property access are used, neither of which trigger the template injection vulnerability.
